arguments_redacted.title: Neighborhood Cookout Plan
arguments_redacted.content:
## Summer Cookout Plan

Join us for a relaxed summer afternoon in the park as neighbors gather around the grill, share homemade sides, and enjoy lawn games together. Bring your family, a folding chair, and an appetite — we'll handle the rest.

### Preparation Checklist

- Confirm headcount and any dietary restrictions one week ahead.
- Pick up grill supplies, drinks, ice, and disposable plates the day before.
- Set up tables, coolers, and lawn games one hour before guests arrive.

[View menu](/cookout-menu/)
